caribbean.headline: Caribbean Weather Update
caribbean.paragraph: St. Maarten is experiencing 22 kt winds with 4.9 ft wave heights and a 38% rain probability, while Cartagena has relatively calmer conditions with 16 kt winds. I expect the Eastern Caribbean to be more impacted today, with St. Maarten being the top port affected by these weather conditions.

mediterranean.headline: Mediterranean Winds Rise
mediterranean.paragraph: Mykonos is experiencing 21 kt winds with 4.9 ft wave heights and less than 10% rain probability, while Venice has 16 kt winds. I expect these conditions to prevail with the dominant swell direction from the NE, impacting port operations in the Eastern and Central Mediterranean, particularly in Mykonos and Venice.
